name: Gem-Knight Lady Lapis Lazuli
name_jp: ジェムナイトレディ・ラピスラズリ
desc:
"Gem-Knight Lapis" + 1 "Gem-Knight" monster
Must first be Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials. You can only Special Summon "Gem-Knight Lady Lapis Lazuli(s)" once per turn. Once per turn: You can send 1 "Gem-Knight" monster from your Deck/Extra Deck to the GY, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each Special Summoned monster on the field.
mnst_eff:

Once per turn: You can send 1 "Gem-Knight" monster from your Deck/Extra Deck to the GY, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each Special Summoned monster on the field.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard

summoning: Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
